title: VPN Connection Troubleshooting
steps: 1. Verify internet connection. 2. Restart GlobalProtect/Cisco AnyConnect client. 3. Flush DNS (ipconfig /flushdns). 4. Re-authenticate via MFA.

title: Password Reset Guide
steps: 1. Navigate to Self-Service Password Portal. 2. Verify identity via registered Phone/Email. 3. Create new complex password. 4. Wait 5 minutes for sync.

title: Hardware Performance Optimization
steps: 1. Check Task Manager for high CPU/RAM usage. 2. Clear Temp files. 3. Disable unnecessary startup items. 4. Check for pending Windows Updates.

title: Outlook Plugin/Attach Issues
steps: 1. Open Outlook in Safe Mode. 2. Disable faulty add-ins. 3. Repair Office via Control Panel. 4. Reset Outlook profile if persists.

title: VDI Session Management
steps: 1. Check local WiFi stability. 2. Log off (do not just disconnect) and re-login. 3. Clear Horizon/Citrix cache. 4. Contact IT for server-side reset.

title: Software Request Process
steps: 1. Check Company Portal/Software Center first. 2. Obtain Manager Approval. 3. Submit license request. 4. Follow auto-install link sent via email.

title: Printer Error 50.1 Handling
steps: 1. Turn printer off and on. 2. Open back cover and verify fuser temperature. 3. Ensure no paper is stuck in tray 2. 4. If Error 50.1 stays, replace fuser unit.

title: WiFi Visibility Issues
steps: 1. Toggle Airplane Mode on/off. 2. Forget the network and re-add. 3. Update Wireless Driver. 4. Ensure device is within range of Area B AP.

title: Hardware Damage (Screen/Battery)
steps: 1. Backup local data to OneDrive. 2. Visit Tech Bar for physical evaluation. 3. Sign equipment checkout form. 4. Receive loaner device.

title: New Joiner Provisioning
steps: 1. Trigger HR system sync. 2. Generate AD account and Email. 3. Assign default O365 licenses. 4. Schedule equipment deployment for Monday.
